_doc: The self-monitor's enforcement-surface mutation ratchet (plan v1.1 §4 / R3). Each gate module is mutation-tested by cws-mutate against its test slice; `floor` is the CURRENT measured coverage and may only RISE — a score below floor fails the gate (so the floor protects the very tests that earn it). `target` is the R3 bar (0.90). Scores are whole-file (diluted by CLI/argparse/print lines outside the gate logic); raise a floor whenever a slice is tightened. cap bounds the mutants sampled (deterministic).

enforcement_surface.note: authorize_step / result_acceptable / ran_ok / steps_seen — the grant + upstream gates
scan() decision logic IS pinned; the survivors are the module's CLI/argparse/print path
tamper-check + in-channel oversight + upstream gate; raise as test_executor.py tightens
SV-2 Ledger-v2 chain verifier (verify_chain + link digests) — prose-clean core, both sides pinned

P1-T06 step-truth from the blessed plan — manifesto sequence AUTHENTICATED against its index.json sha (a post-bless swap cannot decouple the step→tool map from snippet-verify); prose-clean core, both sides pinned
P5-T02 monitor-feed core — pagination (ceil/clamp/slice) + SSE framing + change-digest behind the dashboard's SSE push; prose-clean, both sides pinned
SV-2 per-step snippet TOCTOU decision — prose-clean core
SV-3 grant verifier (offline sig + window + run/plan binding + issuer-scoped replay) — prose-clean core
SV-3 exod step-result verifier (forged-status refusal + binding + replay) — prose-clean core

P2-T12 delegated-execution closure integrity — exod RE-DERIVES every staged digest at time of use vs the grant pin (post-grant porter/core swap + smuggled sibling refused); prose-clean core, both sides pinned
ACL M1 attestation verifier + M2 token-possession proof (verify_acl_attestation + verify_token_proof) — prose-clean core, both sides pinned
